source_proof_status: SEC Companyfacts source rows reviewed; no placeholder values used
validate_result: make imports-validate passed for fundamentals.csv and related local import files
preview_result: make imports-preview showed reviewed fundamentals changes with no warnings
apply_result: make imports-apply applied reviewed fundamentals rows
rejected_row_status: Fundamentals and price rejected-row reports were header-only; peer rejected-row report was absent
readiness_before: Peer valuation inputs blocked by missing peer fundamentals or peer price context
readiness_after: Peer valuation inputs still blocked; blocker advanced to mapped-peer price history for SNDK/F
changed_inputs: reviewed SEC fundamentals for mapped-peer dependencies
what_changed: SEC-backed fundamentals for SNDK and F were added or refreshed; CRDO revenue/FCF fields were also completed from SEC source rows
still_blocked: Mapped-peer price history remains missing for SNDK/F so peer valuation is still withheld
review_command: make sec-stage TICKERS=F,SNDK && make imports-validate && make imports-preview && make imports-apply
proof_command: make readiness && make peer-mapping-queue TOP_N=25 && make stock-report-md TICKER=MU && make stock-report-md TICKER=TSLA
generated_churn_policy: Keep data/fundamentals.csv only as reviewed evidence; keep broad generated readiness/report CSV churn out of commits
